title: Ken Chenault endorses Incorruptible
summary: Former American Express CEO Ken Chenault praises the book for demonstrating how mission-driven leadership helps organizations withstand the test of time.
blockquote: Incorruptible demonstrates the importance of mission-driven leadership and defying the status quo to build organizations that withstand the test of time. Through Eric's decades of experience building and running businesses, he articulates how companies avoid the traps of corruption and lead with values to thrive as organizations and reshape industries.
attribution_title: Former Chairman and CEO of American Express
